code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

let t = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let body = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(body)
mut i = 0
mut cur = ""
mut count = 0

while i < n
  let bopt = string.byte_at(body, i)
  match bopt
  when Some(b)
    if is_ws(b)
      if cur == t
        count = count + 1
      end
      cur = ""
    else
      cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if cur == t
  count = count + 1
end

println("count=#{count}")
